sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try DOWN to test vertical movement at current position
result = action(['DOWN'])
print(f"DOWN: done={result.get('done')}, level_completed={result.get('level_completed')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('O', 'b', 'W'):
        b = n['boundary']
        if len(b) >= 2:
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# If target moved, try DOWN again
if not result.get('done') and not result.get('level_completed'):
    # Check if target moved
    target_moved = False
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'O':
            b = n['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            if min(rows) > 25:  # Target moved down from row 25
                target_moved = True
                break
    
    if target_moved:
        print("Target moved DOWN, trying again")
        result2 = action(['DOWN'])
        print(f"DOWN2: done={result2.get('done')}, level_completed={result2.get('level_completed')}")
        seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
        for n in seg2['nodes']:
            if n['color'] in ('O', 'b', 'W'):
                b = n['boundary']
                if len(b) >= 2:
                    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                    print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
    else:
        print("Target blocked from DOWN at this position")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
